sections.content:
World model: Charcoal at cols 10-13 (starting position). Level 2 not completed after 54+ actions. Tried all positions and clicking various elements.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move charcoal right to cols 26-29 (4 pushes from cols 10-13)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 11}])
print(f"After push 1: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 11}])
print(f"After push 2: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 11}])
print(f"After push 3: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 11}])
print(f"After push 4: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check charcoal position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"Charcoal at: {n['boundary']}")

# Now click on charcoal
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 27}])
print(f"After clicking charcoal at right: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
